decisions.rationale: Self-contained question asking which button to click in Postal Vote BD app to send OTP; directly matches the tag intent.
Clearly asks which button to tap in the Postal Vote BD app for OTP sending; clean fit.
Asks which button to press in the Postal Vote app to send a verification OTP; matches the send-button intent.
Self-contained request for the button to click in Postal Vote BD to send verification OTP; fits the tag.
Directly asks which option to click inside the Postal Vote BD app to send OTP; clean central example.
Asks which exact button is for sending OTP in the Postal Vote BD app; clearly within tag intent.
Asks which button to touch in the Postal Vote app to send OTP; minor typo does not affect intent.
Asks which green button to press to send OTP in Postal Vote BD; still specifically about the OTP send button.
Clearly asks which button to tap in Postal Vote BD to send OTP; clean fit.
Colloquial wording, but it asks which button to touch/use to send OTP in the app; fits the tag.
Uses verification code as an OTP synonym and asks which button to press to send it; clean match.
Asks which colored button should be pressed to send OTP; still identifies the OTP send button.
Asks which button to select in Postal Vote app to send a verification code; matches OTP send button intent.
Asks what to tap in Postal Vote BD app to send OTP; self-contained and on intent.
Asks about forwarding an OTP rather than sending/generating an OTP via the app's send button; intent differs from the tag.
Focuses on an OTP forwarding button, not the app button used to send/request an OTP; not a clean fit for this tag.
Asks which colored button to tap to send OTP in Postal Vote BD; acceptable variant of identifying the send button.
Asks which command/control is for sending OTP in the Postal Vote app; close and self-contained fit to send-button intent.
Directly asks which is the OTP send button in the Postal Vote BD app; clean fit.
Although it says tab, the question asks what UI control to tap to send OTP in Postal Vote BD; fits the practical send-button intent.
Asks which command to choose in Postal Vote BD to send OTP; self-contained and aligned with identifying the send control.
Directly asks which option exists as the OTP send button in Postal Vote BD; clean match.
Uses security code as an OTP synonym and asks what to tap to send it in the Postal Vote app; fits the tag.
Asks which item to select in the Postal Vote app to send OTP; clear UI-control question matching the tag.

result.packet_rationale: Most rows are self-contained Bengali/Bangla-English questions asking which button or UI control in the Postal Vote/Postal Vote BD app should be tapped/clicked to send an OTP or verification/security code. The only rows flagged use “forward” OTP, which changes the intent from requesting/sending an OTP through the app to forwarding an OTP onward.
